{
  "name": "hello-world-express-tailwind",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "private": true,
  "description": "Minimal Express + TypeScript + Tailwind project (initialization)",
  "main": "dist/index.js",
  "scripts": {
    "dev:css": "tailwindcss -i ./src/styles/tailwind.css -o ./public/styles.css --watch",
    "dev:server": "nodemon --watch src --exec ts-node ./src/index.ts",
    "dev": "concurrently \"npm:dev:css\" \"npm:dev:server\"",
    "build:css": "tailwindcss -i ./src/styles/tailwind.css -o ./public/styles.css --minify",
    "build": "npm run build:css && tsc",
    "start": "node ./dist/index.js",
    "test": "jest --passWithNoTests"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "autoprefixer": "^10.4.14",
    "express": "^4.18.2",
    "postcss": "^8.4.21",
    "tailwindcss": "^3.4.0",
    "nodemon": "^2.0.22",
    "concurrently": "^8.0.1"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@types/express": "^4.17.17",
    "@types/jest": "^29.5.2",
    "@types/node": "^20.5.1",
    "@types/supertest": "^2.0.13",
    "jest": "^29.6.1",
    "supertest": "^6.4.2",
    "ts-jest": "^29.1.0",
    "ts-node": "^10.9.1",
    "typescript": "^5.1.6"
  },
  "jest": {
    "preset": "ts-jest",
    "testEnvironment": "node",
    "moduleFileExtensions": [
      "ts",
      "js",
      "json"
    ],
    "testMatch": [
      "**/?(*.)+(spec|test).[tj]s?(x)"
    ]
  }
}

# Hello World Express + Tailwind (Initialization)

This repository is the initial setup for a small Express + TypeScript application styled with Tailwind CSS.

Key pieces:
- Express server in TypeScript (src/index.ts)
- Tailwind CSS entry (src/styles/tailwind.css)
- Tailwind/PostCSS configuration
- Dev scripts to run both the Tailwind watcher and the server concurrently
- A basic API route and a tiny frontend placeholder in public/index.html
- Tests using Jest + Supertest

Getting started

1. Install dependencies
   npm install

2. Run in development (runs Tailwind watcher and server together):
   npm run dev

   - Tailwind will build ./public/styles.css
   - Express server will serve the public folder and an API at /api/hello

3. Build for production (compile TypeScript and build CSS):
   npm run build

4. Start the built app:
   npm start

5. Run tests:
   npm test

Notes
- The dev script uses concurrently to run both the Tailwind watcher and the nodemon server.
- Tailwind CSS will output to public/styles.css; that file is ignored from git because it is generated.

Hello World App

Hello World

This page is a small placeholder. Tailwind CSS will be built to /public/styles.css.

notes: Development: 'npm run dev' (runs Tailwind watcher and the TypeScript server via nodemon).
Build: 'npm run build' (builds Tailwind CSS and compiles TypeScript to dist/).
